arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd consider Ten Hag replacement; PSG ready Yamal bid
arts.sum: Manchester City are ready to rival Arsenal and Liverpool for the signature of Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi as they look for a replacement for the injured Rodri . If Mohamed Salah leaves next summer, Liverpool will try to replace him with Real Madrid winger Rodrygo .

arts.ttl: PSG’s Désiré Doué unlikely to recover in time to face Arsenal, Vitinha’s fitness also a concern
arts.sum: Désiré Doué (19) is guaranteed to miss Paris Saint-Germain’s fixture against Stade Rennais on Friday and L’Équipe understands that it would be a surprise to see the Frenchman involved against Arsenal next…

arts.ttl: Arsenal Star Provides Injury Update After Being Ruled Out for Champions League Match vs. PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are expected to be missing three players for their Matchday 2 clash in the UEFA Champions League against Arsenal. However, the Gunners will also be without a crucial player for this game. Victor Osimhen ’s agent has claimed that “someone made a mistake” in the summer such that the Nigeria international wound up at Galatasaray on loan from Napoli and not at Chelsea or PSG . Osimhen was linked with a big-money move from the Serie A club to Chelsea or PSG, yet he finds himself in Turkey until at least January and potentially until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Manchester United Remain Keen on PSG Summer Target to Strengthen Forward Line, Report Suggests
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Šeško was reportedly on Paris Saint-Germain’s radar during the last summer transfer window as they looked for a new goal-scoring option following Kylian Mbappé’s departure. However, it seems that one Premier League club might have the upper hand in this pursuit. arts.ttl: Arsenal Set to Face PSG in Champions League Amidst Historic Winning Run, Stat Shows
arts.sum: Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain will face off next week in Matchday 2 of the UEFA Champions League, with the Premier League side heading into the clash in top form. Mikel Arteta and his team are feeling confident after going on the road to Manchester City and managing a draw despite being down to 10 men. arts.ttl: PSG Expect Over €100M Fee for Liverpool and Manchester United Target, Report Says
arts.sum: Xavi Simons and Paris Saint-Germain made a short-term decision to loan him out again to RB Leipzig for another season. Next summer, though, the Parisians are expected to make a long-term decision via a transfer sale. This month, journalist Christian Falk revealed that Manchester City and Liverpool are closely monitoring Simons’ situation. arts.ttl: Xavi's Barcelona played 'like Eibar' - Luis Enrique
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique said Xavi Hernández's Barcelona side played "long ball football like Eibar" in a new documentary which follows his first season in charge of the French champions.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Man Utd, PSG-linked Player Have Positive Extension Talks as Barça, Liverpool circle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala’s contract runs until 2026, and now top European clubs are interested in the 21-year-old. The German side have begun extension talks with the player as they look to fend off suitors.
